data.body: E5 COMPLETE. bridge-status/purge-bridge in-process (commit fd94e4b1); 10 byte-parity tests + full interfaces tier green. These commands do not touch the Jira API surface (local .bridge-status.json read + local jira-* dir purge); the live-DIG close-gate attached to E5/E5b was the reconciler-rewire compatibility proof, satisfied by the E5b live DIG probe (DIG-5764 create->validate-all-fields->inbound->delete, zero residue; see ply-dag-skimp). Closing.
